content: The largest type of fruit is the jackfruit, which can grow up to 8 feet (2.4 meters) in length and weigh up to 110 pounds (50 kg). The largest type of vegetable is the pumpkin, with the Guinness World Record holder weighing over 2,600 pounds (1,180 kg) and measuring 13.6 feet (4.1 meters) in circumference.
